sentences.translation: Djeca vole igru jer ih veseli.
sentences.translationEn: Children love play because it makes them happy.

sentences.arabic: أَيْضًا يَتَعَلَّمُونَ أَشْيَاءَ كَثِيرَةً خِلَالَ اللَّعِبِ.
sentences.translation: Takođe uče mnoge stvari kroz igru.
sentences.translationEn: They also learn many things through play.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ حَسَنٌ كَيْفَ يَتَشَارَكُ الأَلْعَابَ مَعَ أَخِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je naučio kako da dijeli igračke s bratom.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan learned how to share toys with his brother.

sentences.translation: Igra uči saradnju, strpljenje i prijateljstvo.
sentences.translationEn: Play teaches cooperation, patience, and friendship.
